nodes.context: English criminal organisation, one of the most powerful in the UK, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, gold bullion hijacking, security fraud, and linked to 25 gangland murders.
Criminal gang whose former enforcer Frankie Fraser was shot in 1991, allegedly ordered by the Adams family.
Criminal organizations from South America with which the Adams family is believed to have connections.
Jamaican criminal gangs with which Tommy Adams is suspected of establishing connections.
Colombian drug cartels from which Tommy Adams allegedly gained an $80 million credit line.

edges.evidence_quote: The shooting of the then 68-year-old "Mad" Frankie Fraser , a former enforcer for The Richardson Gang , in July 1991 was said to have been ordered by the Adams family
edges.context: The Adams family allegedly ordered the shooting of a former enforcer of the Richardson Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The family is believed to have connections with various criminal organisations, specifically with South American drug cartels .
edges.context: The Adams family is believed to have connections with South American drug cartels.

edges.evidence_quote: Tommy Adams is suspected of establishing connections to other international criminal organisations including numerous Yardie gangs
edges.context: Tommy Adams is suspected of establishing connections with Yardie gangs.

edges.evidence_quote: Tommy Adams is suspected of establishing connections to other international criminal organisations including ... gaining an $80 million credit line from Colombian drug cartels.
edges.context: Tommy Adams allegedly gained an $80 million credit line from Colombian drug cartels.
